articles.title: Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga joins stacked StrictlyVC SF lineup for April 30 event
articles.description: Surprise! StrictlyVC San Francisco, which will kick off this year’s events lineup for TechCrunch on April 30 at the Sentro Filipino Cultural Center, is getting a new addition to its increasingly stacked lineup of speakers. articles.title: Nothing introduces an AI-powered dictation tool
articles.description: Nothing's new on-device dictation tool supports over 100 languages.

articles.title: Zondacrypto CEO goes off radar as Poland probe deepens
articles.description: Polish prosecutors are investigating Zondacrypto over alleged fraud and fund access issues, while local media report that CEO Przemysław Kral is in Israel.

articles.title: DeepSeek previews new AI model that ‘closes the gap’ with frontier models
articles.description: DeepSeek says both models are more efficient and performant than DeepSeek V3.2 due to architectural improvements, and have almost "closed the gap" with current leading models, both open and closed, on reasoning benchmarks.

articles.description: Aave (AAVE), up 3.2% from Thursday, was also a top performer.

articles.title: Wisconsin sues Kalshi, Polymarket, others over sports event contracts
articles.description: Wisconsin’s lawsuit against Kalshi, Robinhood, Coinbase, Polymarket and Crypto.com deepens the battle between state gambling enforcers and federal regulators over sports prediction markets.

articles.title: In another wild turn for AI chips, Meta signs deal for millions of Amazon AI CPUs
articles.description: Meta has commandeered a big chunk of Amazon's homegrown CPUs (not GPUs) for AI agentic workloads, signaling that a new kind of chip race has begun.

articles.title: XRP price risks 40% decline versus Bitcoin despite 9-day ETF inflow streak
articles.description: Spot XRP ETFs record net inflows for nine consecutive days, absorbing sell pressure and potentially supporting XRP price recovery over time.

articles.title: Bitcoin price set for best gains since Q4 2024 with $77.5K monthly close
articles.description: Bitcoin price action has one more week to go until it potentially achieves its biggest month's gains since late 2024.

articles.title: Succinct launches iPhone app to cryptographically verify photos
articles.description: Cryptography company Succinct launched Zcam, an iPhone camera app that signs photos and videos at capture to help prove media authenticity in the AI era.

articles.title: Metaplanet raises $50M in zero-interest bonds to buy more Bitcoin
articles.description: Metaplanet raises $50 million through zero-interest bonds from EVO FUND to expand its Bitcoin treasury, extending its capital markets-driven accumulation strategy.

articles.title: Michael Saylor says the bitcoin winter is over. Some experts agree, with caveats.
articles.description: Market analyst Mati Greenspan said bitcoin has not gone through a “winter,” rather a pullback within a broader bull market, adding the next leg up for bitcoin will be driven by nation-state adoption.
